framework.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP) as Open Agent-Tool Standard
framework.description: Anthropic's open standard for agent-tool communication that builds OAuth 2.1 directly into its foundation. MCP is positioning itself as the interoperability layer for AI agents, with recent adoption of Client ID Metadata Documents (CIMD) for dynamic client discovery and connection.
framework.raw_quote: MCP, the open standard for agent-tool communication, didn't reinvent a method; it built OAuth 2.0 (& more recently OAuth 2.1) directly into its foundation for authentication
